  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    App
    Main application class that initializes the JavaFX application and sets up the primary stage with the login screen.
    AuthService
    Service class responsible for handling authentication logic, including verifying user credentials against stored data in the database.
    CartItem
    Immutable record representing a single item in the cashier's in-progress shopping cart, bundling the selected MenuItem with any customisation choices (ice level, sweetness) and chosen add-ons.
    CategoryItemsController
    Controller for displaying menu items in a selected category and allowing the cashier to select and customize them before adding to the current order.
    CurrentStockController
    Controller for the current-stock screen in the manager dashboard, displaying the real-time inventory levels of all items in a read-only table view.
    Customer
    Immutable record representing a customer of the cafe, containing personal details, contact information, accumulated reward points, and the date they joined the loyalty programme.
    CustomerCheckInController
    Controller for the customer check-in dialog where cashiers can look up customers by phone number in order to associate them with the current order and display their accumulated reward points.
    CustomerCheckInController.CustomerSelectedCallback
    Callback interface invoked when a cashier confirms a customer selection.
    CustomerService
    Service class responsible for customer data operations, specifically looking up customers by their phone number so cashiers can associate loyalty accounts with in-progress orders.
    DailySalesSummary
    Immutable record representing a daily sales summary, capturing the calendar date, total revenue, and total quantity of items sold for that day.
    Employee
    Immutable record representing a cafe employee, containing personal details, job role, start date, email address, a salted+hashed password, and whether the account is currently active.
    EmployeeAware
    Interface for JavaFX controllers that need to receive the currently logged-in employee's ID after screen navigation.
    EmployeeFormController
    Controller for the employee form used by managers to create new employees or edit existing employee records including name, role, start date, email, password, and active status.
    EmployeeListController
    Controller for the employee list screen in the manager dashboard, displaying all employees in a table and allowing managers to add, edit, and delete employee records.
    IceLevel
    Enumeration of ice-level options available for customisable menu items, each paired with a user-friendly label shown in the ordering UI.
    Inventory
    Immutable record representing a single inventory item in the cafe's inventory management system, including current quantity, reorder threshold, unit of measurement, supplier cost, and the date it was last restocked.
    InventoryRefillOrderController
    Controller for the inventory refill-order screen in the manager dashboard, allowing managers to view items whose stock is below the reorder threshold and submit restock orders for individual items.
    InventoryService
    Service class responsible for CRUD operations on inventory items, including fetching current stock levels, updating quantities, adding new items, and deleting items that are no longer carried.
    InventoryUsageData
    Immutable record representing the usage of a single inventory item on a specific date, used for the inventory-usage report to help management track consumption rates.
    ItemCustomizationController
    Controller for the item-customization screen where cashiers select size, sweetness level, ice level, and add-ons for a specific menu item before adding it to the cart.
    LoginController
    Controller for the login screen that authenticates users and navigates them to the appropriate dashboard screen based on their assigned role.
    ManagerDashboardController
    Controller for the main manager dashboard screen, providing navigation buttons to employee management, menu/pricing, reports, and inventory management sub-screens.
    MenuItem
    Immutable record representing a single item on the cafe's menu, including its name, category, available size, base price, and whether it is currently offered to customers.
    MenuItemContent
    Immutable record representing the link between a menu item and an inventory ingredient, specifying how much of that ingredient is consumed each time the menu item is ordered.
    MenuItemFormController
    Controller for the menu-item form dialog used by managers to add new menu items or edit existing ones, including name, category, size, price, availability, and the associated inventory ingredient requirements.
    MenuService
    Service class responsible for all menu-item database operations, including fetching categories, items by category, available sizes, add-ons, and performing create, update, and delete operations on menu items and their inventory ingredient links.
    MenuViewController
    Controller for the menu-view screen in the manager dashboard, displaying all available menu items in a table and allowing managers to add, edit, and delete items.
    Order
    Immutable record representing a completed order, containing the IDs of the employee who processed it and the optional loyalty customer, together with the order timestamp, total price, tip, and payment method used.
    OrderingScreenController
    Controller for the main ordering screen used by cashiers to create and manage customer orders, including browsing menu categories, customizing items, initiating customer check-in, and processing payments.
    OrderingTrendsController
    Controller for the ordering-trends report screen in the manager dashboard, displaying line charts for product sales and dollar sales over a manager-selected date range, with optional log-scale Y-axis and navigation to other report screens.
    OrderItem
    Immutable record representing a single line item within an order, linking to the ordered menu item, optional parent item (for add-ons), customisation options (ice and sugar level), quantity, and the price charged at the time of the order.
    OrderService
    Service class responsible for order submission, coordinating the persistence of the order header, its individual line items, and the corresponding inventory decrements all within a single database transaction.
    PaymentMethodSummary
    Simple data holder for the X‑report: number of orders and total sales grouped by payment method for a given hour/day.
    PaymentScreenController
    Controller for the payment screen where cashiers select a payment method, optionally add a tip, confirm the order total, and then submit the order to the backend for processing.
    ProductSalesData
    Immutable record representing the aggregated sales data for a single product on a given date, capturing the quantity sold and total revenue generated.
    ReportService
    Service class responsible for generating all management reports: daily sales summaries, product-level sales breakdowns, sales by category, inventory usage, X-report hourly payment summaries, and the end-of-day Z-report with reset logic.
    RestockOrder
    Immutable record representing a restock order placed by an employee to replenish a low-stock inventory item, tracking the quantity ordered, order timestamp, and current fulfilment status.
    RestockOrderService
    Service class responsible for managing restock orders, providing methods to create new orders when inventory runs low and retrieve the full order history.
    SalesReportController
    Controller for the sales-report screen in the manager dashboard, showing aggregated sales data (quantity sold and revenue) per menu item over a date range selected by the manager.
    StringUtils
    Utility class providing common string-manipulation helpers used throughout the application.
    SweetnessLevel
    Enumeration of sweetness-level options available for customisable menu items, each paired with a user-friendly percentage label shown in the ordering UI.
    TakeInventoryController
    Controller for the take-inventory screen in the manager dashboard, allowing managers to update stock quantities for existing inventory items, add entirely new items via a dialog, and delete items they no longer carry.
    TransactionCompleteController
    Controller for the transaction-complete screen shown after a successful order submission, allowing cashiers to print or email a receipt or immediately start a new sale.
    XReportController
    Controller for the X-report screen in the manager dashboard.
    ZReportController
    Controller for the Z-report screen in the manager dashboard.
    ZReportResult
    Immutable record representing the full result of a Z-report run, including the business date, aggregate totals, per-payment-method breakdown, and the list of employee IDs who signed off on the closeout.
    ZReportTotals
    Immutable record holding the monetary totals captured during a Z-report run.
